name: weekcrm
description: WeekCRM — CRM news, reviews, and vendor directory

scripts.postinstall: node -e "if(process.env.VERCEL||process.env.CI)process.exit(0);try{require('child_process').execSync('npx --yes playwright install chromium',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.warn('playwright browser install skipped:',e.message)}"
